item.title: Microsoft 365、実はQ1のSLA未達だったって知ってました？📉 TeamsとExchange Onlin…
item.author: 胡田@Microsoft MVP(2014~)&MCT / Masahiko Ebisuda (@ebibibibibibi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Microsoft 365、実はQ1のSLA未達だったって知ってました？📉

TeamsとExchange Onlineで世界的な障害が相次ぎ、稼働率は99.526%――基準を下回る結果に。

「落ちてる気がする」は気のせいじゃなかったかも。詳細はこちら👇

https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/06/microsoft-365teamsexchange-onlineq1sla99526-microsoft-365-outage-blocks-access-t/

#TechNews #Microsoft365
item.content:encoded:
Microsoft 365、実はQ1のSLA未達だったって知ってました？📉

TeamsとExchange Onlineで世界的な障害が相次ぎ、稼働率は99.526%――基準を下回る結果に。

「落ちてる気がする」は気のせいじゃなかったかも。詳細はこちら👇

https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/07/06/microsoft-365teamsexchange-onlineq1sla99526-microsoft-365-outage-blocks-access-t/

#TechNews #Microsoft365

item.title: こんなものに賛同して喜んで海外に講師として派遣される研究者がいないことを望む。派遣される研究者は自ずとアレな研究者になる…
item.author: kz__itkr (@woodenstorehouse.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんなものに賛同して喜んで海外に講師として派遣される研究者がいないことを望む。派遣される研究者は自ずとアレな研究者になるんだろうな。そもそも学会として撥ねつけないと。

www.yomiuri.co.jp/politics/202...
item.content:encoded:
こんなものに賛同して喜んで海外に講師として派遣される研究者がいないことを望む。派遣される研究者は自ずとアレな研究者になるんだろうな。そもそも学会として撥ねつけないと。

www.yomiuri.co.jp/politics/202...

item.title: #東方Project #絵描きさんと繋がりたい "レミリアに会えないよ" 「2時間前に出直してきな。」 7月12日は…
item.author: ごまぴよん (@gogogomapiyon86.bsky.social)
item.description:
#東方Project
#絵描きさんと繋がりたい
"レミリアに会えないよ"
「2時間前に出直してきな。」

7月12日は咲夜の日
ちょっと早かったね。
item.content:encoded:
#東方Project
#絵描きさんと繋がりたい
"レミリアに会えないよ"
「2時間前に出直してきな。」

7月12日は咲夜の日
ちょっと早かったね。

item.title: The millennial who won $400,000 bonuses for Samsung's semico…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
The millennial who won $400,000 bonuses for Samsung's semiconductor workers now leads a fractured union with many bitter over being left out of the windfall. Read more: bloom.bg/4p2zsya

📷️: Jean Chung/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:
The millennial who won $400,000 bonuses for Samsung's semiconductor workers now leads a fractured union with many bitter over being left out of the windfall. Read more: bloom.bg/4p2zsya

📷️: Jean Chung/Bloomberg

item.description: China test fired an intercontinental ballistic missile with a dummy warhead in the Pacific Ocean, the first such launch in two years.
item.content:encoded: China test fired an intercontinental ballistic missile with a dummy warhead in the Pacific Ocean, the first such launch in two years.

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Te…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: "ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"032 坂本龍一「Cafe Lotus」 youtu.be/whXKy-jX-1M?…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"032
坂本龍一「Cafe Lotus」

youtu.be/whXKy-jX-1M?...

2週連続で坂本龍一の曲ですw
昔、坂本龍一がインドネシアのバリ島を旅するTV番組がありました
そこで作曲して最後に演奏した曲です

確認出来るだけでYAMAHA DX7、イミュレーターII、YAMAHA TX7その他をRoland MC-4でドライブしてるみたいですね

バリ島伝統舞踊であるケチャがサンプリングされて使われています
FMなシーケンスに手引きのエレピ

どう考えても音源化はされないでしょうね
残念ですぅ
item.content:encoded:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"032
坂本龍一「Cafe Lotus」

youtu.be/whXKy-jX-1M?...

2週連続で坂本龍一の曲ですw
昔、坂本龍一がインドネシアのバリ島を旅するTV番組がありました
そこで作曲して最後に演奏した曲です

確認出来るだけでYAMAHA DX7、イミュレーターII、YAMAHA TX7その他をRoland MC-4でドライブしてるみたいですね

バリ島伝統舞踊であるケチャがサンプリングされて使われています
FMなシーケンスに手引きのエレピ

どう考えても音源化はされないでしょうね
残念ですぅ

item.title: Secrecy surrounding executions in Florida has left victims’ …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Secrecy surrounding executions in Florida has left victims’ families, prisoners and lawyers searching for clues about the governor’s selection process.

“He could be deciding who is next to die by throwing darts at a list of names,” one lawyer said.

with @nytimes.com
item.content:encoded:
Secrecy surrounding executions in Florida has left victims’ families, prisoners and lawyers searching for clues about the governor’s selection process.

“He could be deciding who is next to die by throwing darts at a list of names,” one lawyer said.

with @nytimes.com

item.title: Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic …
item.author: Jess Piper (@piperformissouri.bsky.social)
item.description:
Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic socialism and communism, I’m not engaging with you.

Crack a book.
item.content:encoded:
Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic socialism and communism, I’m not engaging with you.

Crack a book.

item.title: Resistance is an art form! Kevin Champeny's work celebrates…
item.author: Princess Vimentin PhD | Cancer Biologist (@princess-vimentin.bsky.social)
item.description:
Resistance is an art form!

Kevin Champeny's work celebrates the beauty of accumulation how countless small elements can create depth, movement, & meaning that no single piece could achieve alone.

A reminder that the smallest details often carry the greatest impact.

🔥🔥💙
#pinks
item.content:encoded:
Resistance is an art form!

Kevin Champeny's work celebrates the beauty of accumulation how countless small elements can create depth, movement, & meaning that no single piece could achieve alone.

A reminder that the smallest details often carry the greatest impact.

🔥🔥💙
#pinks

item.title: Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday Cho…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday

Choose benevolence, not anger
Other people struggle too, and not always visibly

The smallest actions can make the most significant impacts and turn someone’s entire day around
You never know how much good you do

Do good 🧡
item.content:encoded:
Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday

Choose benevolence, not anger
Other people struggle too, and not always visibly

The smallest actions can make the most significant impacts and turn someone’s entire day around
You never know how much good you do

Do good 🧡

item.title: A Tennessee conservation nonprofit has acquired a 600-acre t…
item.author: Doc Sportello ❌👑 (@digyoursoul.bsky.social)
item.description:
A Tennessee conservation nonprofit has acquired a 600-acre tract bordering the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, protecting one of the largest remaining privately owned parcels next to the park from future development.

www.goodnewsnetwork.org/great-smokey...
item.content:encoded:
A Tennessee conservation nonprofit has acquired a 600-acre tract bordering the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, protecting one of the largest remaining privately owned parcels next to the park from future development.

www.goodnewsnetwork.org/great-smokey...

item.title: Dang, pretty good list 👍 How many have you read? 📚 I coun…
item.author: Eric R Fairhurst 📚 🦋 🎷🎨 (@efairhurst.bsky.social)
item.description:
Dang, pretty good list 👍
How many have you read? 📚 I counted 6 for me, I have some reading to do. 😂 What would you add??
item.content:encoded:

item.title: I've got banned books, health issues, an old house that keep…
item.author: Nikki Grimes (@poetnikki.bsky.social)
item.description: I've got banned books, health issues, an old house that keeps its hands in my pocket, & am still reeling from the loss of a friend. But I'm giddy! 7 of my books (these four included) are in the Obama Presidential Center Library!Thanks Edith Campbell for giving me the heads up. Grinning like crazy!
item.content:encoded: I've got banned books, health issues, an old house that keeps its hands in my pocket, & am still reeling from the loss of a friend. But I'm giddy! 7 of my books (these four included) are in the Obama Presidential Center Library!Thanks Edith Campbell for giving me the heads up. Grinning like crazy!

item.title: Durch Zufall habe ich gerade mitbekommen, dass die deutschen…
item.author: Yannick (@yarei00.bsky.social)
item.description: Durch Zufall habe ich gerade mitbekommen, dass die deutschen U 20-Handballerinnen heute in China mit einem 33:26 gegen Dänemark Weltmeisterinnen geworden sind. Ich finde, das sollten mehr Leute wissen.
item.content:encoded: Durch Zufall habe ich gerade mitbekommen, dass die deutschen U 20-Handballerinnen heute in China mit einem 33:26 gegen Dänemark Weltmeisterinnen geworden sind. Ich finde, das sollten mehr Leute wissen.

item.title: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.
item.content:encoded: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.

item.title: My favorite reason is #5 .
item.author: Gracie12 📎 (@gracienlucy.bsky.social)
item.description:
My favorite reason is #5
.
item.content:encoded:
My favorite reason is #5
.

item.title: “Bela participação do Neymar no jogo. Pra quem esperava que …
item.author: Jeff Nascimento (@jnascim.info)
item.description:
“Bela participação do Neymar no jogo. Pra quem esperava que ele fosse decidir a Copa do Mundo pro Brasil, taí arranjando briga no final da partida”

— Ana Thaís Matos
item.content:encoded:
“Bela participação do Neymar no jogo. Pra quem esperava que ele fosse decidir a Copa do Mundo pro Brasil, taí arranjando briga no final da partida”

— Ana Thaís Matos

item.title: A detainee at Texas’ Camp East Montana immigration detention…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A detainee at Texas’ Camp East Montana immigration detention facility attempted to kill himself.

In notes, staff dismissed the incident as a “suicidal gesture made to force security staff to release him” from isolation.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
A detainee at Texas’ Camp East Montana immigration detention facility attempted to kill himself.

In notes, staff dismissed the incident as a “suicidal gesture made to force security staff to release him” from isolation.

with @texastribune.org
